nodes.label: AI for mechanical task automation (LaTeX conversion)
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for nuanced understanding
nodes.grounding_span: AI does much of the legwork for that process

nodes.label: AI as context-blind content generator
nodes.grounding_span: the AI doesn't understand the context of the interviews very well

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.grounding_span: they can be very prone to errors, oversimplifications, and confirmation bias

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: there's definitely a sense that AI is superior to human writing

nodes.label: AI as source of engaging content
nodes.grounding_span: it's surprisingly good at identifying emotionally engaging content

nodes.label: AI comfort and prompt proficiency
nodes.label_negative: AI reliance without human baseline skills
nodes.grounding_span: my aim is to be AI-fluent but not AI-reliant

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: what would normally be several hours of review work... can be cut down to a few minutes

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: fact-checking each answer is more tedious than searching online and learning the data for myself

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: human creativity has more room to expand and flourish

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: we'll always need a certain baseline of writers and researchers who... are equally adept at doing it all 'by hand'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code generation
nodes.grounding_span: The most satisfied would probably be the promo snippets we generate using AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for social media content
nodes.grounding_span: it was a constant struggle to restrain the AI from using emojis

nodes.label: Positive acceptance of AI for business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I work for my clients, and their preferences and needs come first

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: the stories we have to share will become an even more valuable commodity

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I might refine the instructions to focus more tightly on a particular interview segment

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: my aim is to be AI-fluent but not AI-reliant
